question_text: Which of the following is the correct definition of pressure?

options.label: A
options.text: The total amount of force applied to an object

options.label: B
options.text: The force acting over a given area

options.label: C
options.text: The weight of an object measured in Newtons

options.label: D
options.text: The speed at which a force is applied

correct_answer: B) The force acting over a given area
explanation: Pressure is defined as force divided by the area over which it acts. The other options describe different quantities like total force, weight, or speed, which are not pressure.
